task_completion.description: Open FreeCAD and create a new document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is open with a new active document visible in the tree view or workspace.

task_completion.description: Create the base cylinder or wheel geometry with a 60 mm outer diameter and 15 mm width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D cylindrical shape is visible in the viewport, or a sketch showing a 30 mm radius / 60 mm diameter with a 15 mm extrusion (Pad/Revolution) is present in the feature tree.

task_completion.description: Create an 8 mm diameter center bore through-hole along the central rotation axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A hole passing completely through the center of the cylinder is visible in the 3D viewport, or a sketch/hole feature specifying an 8 mm diameter (4 mm radius) is visible.

task_completion.description: Create a V-groove centered on the wheel width, running around the full outer circumference, with a 60-degree angle and 5 mm radial depth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The outer circumference of the 3D wheel has a distinct V-shaped indentation. A sketch or groove feature showing an isosceles triangle with a 60-degree apex and 5 mm depth may be visible.

task_completion.description: Save the document as vgroove_pulley.FCStd in the ~/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar shows 'vgroove_pulley.FCStd', or a file manager/save dialog confirms the file is saved in the Documents/FreeCAD folder.

task_completion.description: Export the part as a STEP file named vgroove_pulley.step in the ~/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog box is visible saving 'vgroove_pulley.step', or a terminal/file manager window shows the .step file successfully created in the target directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD application (GUI or internal Python console) to build the geometry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the FreeCAD interface, feature tree, or internal console, rather than just running a pre-written bash/python script in a standalone terminal to generate the files.

integrity.description: The 3D model was actually generated and rendered in the workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD 3D viewport displays the solid model of the pulley, proving the geometry was successfully computed and not just an empty file.

integrity.description: The agent did not download a pre-made 3D model from the internet.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no web browser open searching for or downloading STEP or FCStd files of pulleys.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target V-groove pulley must have an outer diameter of 60 mm, a total width of 15 mm, and an 8 mm center bore. The V-groove must be 5 mm deep with a 60-degree included angle. The final bounding box should be approximately 60x60x15 mm. The calculated volume of the correct solid is approximately 38,937 mm³ to 39,169 mm³.
